creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
Entirely a duplicate; the whole issue is that genericbearer links to a wrongly-versioned symbol:

[adridg@beastie]$ readelf -a /usr/local/lib/qt5/plugins/bearer/libqgenericbearer.so | grep QNetworkInterfaceC1ERKS
00000020b550 004500000007 R_X86_64_JUMP_SLOT  0000000000000000 _ZN17QNetworkInterfaceC1ERKS_ + 0
    69: 0000000000000000    20 FUNC    GLOBAL DEFAULT  UND _ZN17QNetworkInterfaceC1ERKS_@Qt_5 (2)
[adridg@beastie]$ readelf -a /usr/local/lib/qt5/libQt5Network.so.5 | grep QNetworkInterfaceC1ERKS
  1246: 00000000000c7a70    20 FUNC    GLOBAL DEFAULT   12 _ZN17QNetworkInterfaceC1ERKS_@@Qt_5 (3)
